name: wa_revive_ts_bound
drl: rule W when accumulate( E($t : ts) over window:time(100ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 windowed-accumulate (D-154/D-155): the cf719x34 exact cell: sum($t:ts) folds the LIVE ts (200) at revival — the fold reads current fields; only the WINDOW position is insert-fixed.
